preReview.title: FC Dallas v Houston Dynamo: Hosts 'psyched' for Texas derby
preReview.description: FC Dallas host the Houston Dynamo in a Texas derby in MLS on Saturday, with just three points separating the rivals.

QAData.question: Who won between FC Dallas and Houston Dynamo FC on Sun, 18 May 2025 01:25:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Houston Dynamo FC won 2–0 over FC Dallas on Sun, 18 May 2025 01:25:00 GMT.
